title: 专业精神 / Professionalism
summary: 专业精神=胜任、勤勉、诚信;持续进修保持能力,只在能力范围内执业,超出时寻求协助或转介。 / Professionalism means competence, diligence and integrity; maintain competence through continuing education, act within your competence, and refer when beyond it.

sections.heading: 胜任与进修
sections.body: 须具备并持续更新专业知识,了解所推荐产品与监管要求。

sections.heading: Competence & CPD
sections.body: Possess and continually update professional knowledge of products and regulation.

sections.heading: 能力边界
sections.body: 遇到超出能力的事项应寻求协助或转介专家,不可不懂装懂。

sections.heading: Limits of competence
sections.body: When a matter exceeds your competence, seek help or refer to a specialist rather than pretending.

keyPoints: 胜任 + 持续进修 / Competence + continuing education
只在能力范围内执业 / Act within your competence
超能力范围应转介 / Refer when beyond competence
